title: Create: Controllable
description: Adds Create scroll functionality to Mr. Crayfish's Controllable mod.
body:
Adds Create's elevator and gui scroll wheel function to Controllable. 
how 2 video:<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/whgrdOUVB58" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
**Warning: This mod requires dependencies!**
## dependencies:
1. Create Mod 6.0.8 or above. [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)
2. Controllable Mod 0.21.9 or above .[Controllable](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controllable)
3. Frameork mod 0.8.0 or above. [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)
4. **ALSO** for version 2.0 you **MUST** disable virtual cursor in Controllable's settings!!!
